formula_templates_bank_v1.description: Reusable outfit formula templates. Each template is a short modular blueprint, not a brand/product recommendation.

safe.template: Clean top + well-fitting bottom + simple shoe. Add one neat accessory to make it feel intentional.
Monochrome base (same color family) + one texture or layer. Keep accessories minimal and clean.
Structured layer (shirt/jacket/blazer) over a simple base. Let the layer be the ‘main character’.
Fitted top + relaxed bottom (or vice versa). Keep one side clean to balance the silhouette.

bold.template: Simple base + one statement piece (color/print/jacket). Keep everything else quiet so it lands cleanly.
Neutral base + one unexpected accent (shoe/bag/outer layer). Anchor it with clean lines.

safe.template: Two-tone palette (2–3 colors max) + clean silhouettes. Minimal accessories, clean finish.
Straight lines + neutral base + one structured item (bag/shoe/layer). Keep it crisp.
Simple set (top+bottom) with one repeat tone (shoe+bag). That repeat makes it look expensive.

bold.template: Minimal silhouette + one bold color block (only one). Keep everything else neutral.

safe.template: Relaxed base + one structured element (overshirt/jacket/bag). Comfort stays, polish goes up.
Soft pieces in a tight palette + clean sneakers/sandals. The cohesion makes it look intentional.
Easy silhouette + tidy details (rolled sleeves, neat hem). Small tweaks, big impact.

bold.template: Comfort base + one elevated statement (bold jacket or accessory). Keep everything else simple.

safe.template: Clean silhouette + one soft statement (neckline/earring/layer). Keep it intentional, not loud.
Monochrome or tonal base + one polished finish (sleeker shoe or structured bag).

bold.template: Simple base + one bold element (color/shine/statement piece). Anchor with neutral shoe/bag.

safe.template: Structured top/layer + clean bottom + neutral shoe. Keep accessories minimal and sharp.
Crisp silhouette + controlled palette (2–3 tones). Let the structure do the talking.

bold.template: Professional base + one subtle personality detail (texture or small accent). Keep everything else clean.

safe.template: Reliable work uniform: clean top + tailored-ish bottom + neat shoe. Add one structured bag/layer.
Tonal palette + structured layer. Looks premium with minimal effort.

bold.template: Work base + one confident accent (color or statement shoe). Keep everything else simple.

safe.template: Elevated silhouette + one dressy finish (shoe/bag/jewelry). Keep it refined and cohesive.
Clean base + controlled shine (one). Let one element be the hero and keep the rest quiet.

bold.template: Statement piece + simple supports. Anchor it with a cohesive palette so it looks intentional.

safe.template: Comfort base + light layer + clean shoe. Keep palette tight for a put-together travel look.
Easy silhouette + structured bag. The bag makes it look intentional even when comfy.

bold.template: Neutral travel base + one standout layer (jacket/shirt). Keep everything else minimal.

safe.template: Light silhouette + clean sandal + simple bag. Keep it breezy but structured.
Tonal palette + one natural texture element. Effortless and photo-ready.

bold.template: Simple base + one bold color or print. Anchor with neutral accessories.

safe.template: Festive base + one statement jewelry piece. Keep everything else clean and cohesive.
Traditional or fusion silhouette + controlled shine (one). Let fabric/detail lead.

bold.template: Statement outfit + quiet supports. Keep palette cohesive so it looks expensive, not noisy.

safe.template: Clean tee/shirt + well-fitting trousers/jeans + neat sneaker/loafer. Add one structured layer if needed.
Tonal menswear formula: same-family top+bottom + one texture layer. Minimal accessories, sharp finish.
Overshirt/jacket as hero + simple base. Keep the fit clean through shoulders and torso.

bold.template: Neutral base + one statement layer (color/texture). Anchor with clean shoe.

usage_rules.if_user_is_vulnerable: return 2 safe formulas only; suppress bold
